assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-8 show: '## Repository Registry' header, table with headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and separator '|---|---|---|---|' but no data rows, followed by 'No repositories configured — no Serena MCP servers are available.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 10-14 show: '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 16-22 show: '## Code Intelligence' with 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and a Limitations subsection stating 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 5-6 under '### Serena MCP Tools': 'No Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools. The available tool listing included only built-in tools (Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep) and GitHub MCP tools...No tools matching the `mcp__<instance>__*` Serena pattern were found.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 8-15 under '### Atlassian MCP Tools': 'No Atlassian MCP tools were discovered.' and under '## Jira Configuration': 'Jira fields were provided via manual entry — auto-discovery was not possible due to the absence of Atlassian MCP tools.'

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 19-20 under '## Code Intelligence': 'The user was prompted about continuing without code intelligence given that no Serena MCP servers were found. The user chose to continue without code intelligence.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 24-28 show: '## Bug Configuration' with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'

assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 22-23 state: 'The opt-in prompt for Security Configuration (triage-security) was presented to the user. The user declined to enable security triage. The ## Security Configuration section was not added to CLAUDE.md.' Confirmed: claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section.
